message:
fix(test): serialize update_check integration tests to prevent env var race

12 integration tests in update_check::tests all mutate the shared
CASS_UPDATE_API_BASE_URL env var via unsafe set_var/remove_var. When
Rust runs tests in parallel, these race on the env var, causing
intermittent failures (e.g. integration_fetch_release_404_error hits
another test's 200-returning server instead of its own 404 server).

Add #[serial] from serial_test crate to all 12 affected tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
